## Showcase

[Remembering Dirk Kempthorne](https://www.idahoptv.org/shows/idahoreports/)

Idaho Reports revisits the career of former US senator and Idaho Governor Dirk Kempthorne. Airs May 7 @ 8:30PM and again May 10 @ 7:30PM.

[Visit Idaho Reports](https://www.idahoptv.org/shows/idahoreports/) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/Local%20Shows/Idaho%20Reports/Idaho%20In%20Session/c8d5dce170_DirkKempthorneBentoHero.jpg)](https://www.idahoptv.org/shows/idahoreports/)

[Support Nonprofits During Idaho Gives](https://www.idahogives.org/organizations/friends-of-idaho-public-television)

Show your support for community organizations like Friends of Idaho Public Television during Idaho Gives (May 4-7).

[Give now](https://www.idahogives.org/organizations/friends-of-idaho-public-television) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/Development/b5b16151df_Id%20Gives%20HERO.png)](https://www.idahogives.org/organizations/friends-of-idaho-public-television)

[Suffs](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/suffs-preview-wmfsmx/)

Witness the American women's suffrage movement in this Tony-winning Broadway musical. Airs May 8 @ 8PM.

[Watch preview](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/suffs-preview-wmfsmx/) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/National%20Shows/4e54befcd8_GP%20Suffs%20HERO.png)](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/suffs-preview-wmfsmx/)

[Employers May Match Your Donation](https://www.idahoptv.org/support/individualgiving/matching/)

Thousands of community-minded companies offer matching gift programs that can double the impact of your donations to Idaho Public Television.

[Learn more](https://www.idahoptv.org/support/individualgiving/matching/) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/Development/1cc268ecf5_hero_DoubleImpactBentoHeroCarousel.jpg)](https://www.idahoptv.org/support/individualgiving/matching/)

![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Logo/4dbb93de26_OUID%20Logo%20primary%20hori%20grad%20RGB%20(1).png)[Owyhee Canyoneers](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/outdoor-idaho-owyhee-canyoneers/)

An intrepid group of adventurers hikes up slot canyons and rappels across hidden pools in wild country few Idahoans visit. Airs May 10 @ 7PM.

[Watch online anytime](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/outdoor-idaho-owyhee-canyoneers/) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/Local%20Shows/Outdoor%20Idaho/c38f03da34_OI%20Owyhee%20Canyoneers%20HERO.png)](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/outdoor-idaho-owyhee-canyoneers/)

[Natchez](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/natchez-trailer-rdqdu0/)

In a Mississippi town, historic homes fuel a tourism economy rooted in antebellum nostalgia. Airs May 11 @ 10PM.

[Watch preview](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/natchez-trailer-rdqdu0/) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/National%20Shows/a0d2971d89_Ind%20Lens%20Natchez%20HERO.png)](https://video.idahoptv.org/video/natchez-trailer-rdqdu0/)

[Thank You to Our Education Sponsors](https://www.albertsons.com/about-us.html)

Educational programs and community outreach are made possible by sponsors like Albertsons. Thank you!

[Learn more about Albertsons](https://www.albertsons.com/about-us.html) [![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/1_Home/Hero%20Images%20%26%20Logos/Hero%20Background%20Image/Education%20Related%20/f8a98eca24_EDUC-HERO--Educ-Sponsors-Albertsons.jpg)](https://www.albertsons.com/about-us.html)

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.idahoptv.org/about/privacypolicy/)
- [Sitemap](https://www.idahoptv.org/sitemap/)
- [Producer Policies](https://dc79r36mj3c9w.cloudfront.net/prod/filer_public/idahoptv/PDFs/IR/d8e80a83d3_IdahoPTVProductionPolicies02112020.pdf)

The Friends of Idaho Public Television is a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization and accepts tax-deductible donations designated to support public television programs and productions.

Contributions might also qualify for the expanded Idaho State Education Tax Credit. Idaho Public Television does not trade or sell a donor's personal information with third parties.

Copyright @ 2026 Idaho Public Television \| [Idaho Board of Education](https://boardofed.idaho.gov/) \| [State of Idaho](http://www.idaho.gov/)

Your privacy is important to us. IdahoPTV's Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide when visiting our websites. We prioritize the security of your personally identifiable information and ensure your confidence in transmitting personal data and making financial transactions. Please read this policy carefully, as it applies to idahoptv.org and associated web properties. For questions or concerns, feel free to contact us.


[Read the IdahoPTV Privacy Policy](https://www.idahoptv.org/about/privacypolicy/)
